# Soft2 Tool120 Grep5 Contract

## Soft 2
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.02 with quality bias floor 0.02 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 120
tool result budgets default to 120 chars with 2-char previews for denser reclaim

## Grep 5
Grep head defaults to 5 lines for denser search results

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/footer vitest
